name: Mekidulu 8782 | The "Galaxy View" 73" Multi-Capsule Wood Cat Empire
features: 🚀 Triple Space Capsule Experience: Featuring 3 high-clarity acrylic pods that provide a 'weightless' 360-degree panoramic view for multiple cats.
🏗️ 7 Levels of Vertical Mastery: A majestic 73-inch tall empire with a staggered layout that encourages active climbing and healthy joint mobility.
💎 Modern Furniture Aesthetic: Replaces dated carpet towers with a sleek, moisture-resistant wood finish that complements mid-century and minimalist home decor.
🛡️ Rock-Solid Stability: Engineered with a widened heavy-duty base and precision joints to absorb the shock of high-energy leaps and sprints.
🛋️ Total Furniture Protection: Integrated with multiple premium natural sisal-wrapped pillars to redirect scratching instincts and save your sofas.
✨ Hygienic & Anti-Microbial: The hair-free wood surfaces prevent dander buildup and odors; simply wipe clean in seconds for a pristine home.
🏰 Private Luxury Condo: Includes a secluded, spacious wooden hideaway for uninterrupted naps and a sense of security.
🐾 Universal Accessibility: Intentionally designed platform spacing ensures that both high-energy kittens and senior cats can navigate all 7 tiers safely.
📈 Extreme Cost-Performance: A masterpiece of 'China's Power Supply Chain,' delivering elite architectural design at an unbeatable factory-direct price.

name: Mekidulu 72" Modern Wood Cat Tree - Horizon Series Vertical Jungle
features: 🌳 12 Natural Sisal Pillars: A massive 360-degree scratching sanctuary with 12 reinforced posts to redirect instincts away from your furniture.
🏰 8 Levels of Exploration: A complex vertical jungle standing at 72.1 inches, featuring a Space Pod, Private Condo, and multi-level observation decks.
🔝 Alpha Vantage Point: Designed for multi-cat households to provide high-altitude security and clear territorial hierarchy.
💎 Architectural Stability: Built with high-density, furniture-grade wood to ensure a zero-wobble experience for large or active breeds.
✨ Hygienic Wood Finish: Moisture-resistant, smooth surfaces that stay fur-free and are easily sanitized with a quick wipe.
🏗️ Modular Precision: Engineered for easy assembly with high-quality hardware and clear, illustrated step-by-step instructions.
🌿 Modern Minimalist Design: A sophisticated aesthetic that integrates seamlessly with high-end Western home interiors.
📈 Factory-Direct Advantage: Premium scale and materials delivered at an aggressive price point through optimized supply chain management.
🐾 Long-Term Durability: Professional-grade materials built to withstand high-frequency usage in active feline households.

name: Mekidulu Y18 | The "Emerald Forest" 59" Modern Wood Cat Tower
features: Emerald Forest Aesthetic: Exclusive botanical green accents that harmonize with modern indoor plants.
6-Level Sanctuary: Standing at 59 inches, designed for vertical exploration and healthy climbing.
Engineered for Large Breeds: High-density wood frame and thickened pillars ensure zero wobble for Maine Coons.
Hygienic & Hair-Free: 100% hair-free wood surfaces that can be wiped clean in seconds.
Furniture-Grade Stability: Extra-wide weighted base combined with an anti-topple wall security strap.
Heavy-Duty Sisal: 100% natural scratching surface to redirect instincts away from your furniture.
Sky-High Perch: Features an ultra-soft top deck for cats to survey their territory in comfort.
Extreme Cost-Performance: Bridging high-end design with China's factory-direct supply chain power.
Moisture-Resistant: Built with premium materials to ensure long-lasting durability in any home environment.
